Title: Black Dog
Writer: Guan Hu, Rui Ge, Bing Wu
Actors: Eddie Peng, Liya Tong, Jia Zhang-ke
Plot: Released from jail, Lang returns to his hometown in Northwest China. As part of a dog patrol tasked with clearing stray dogs before the 2008 Olympics, he bonds with a black stray. The two lonely souls embark on a new journey toget...
